SELECT regexp_extract(date_string, '(\d+)-(\d+)-(\d+)', ['y', 'm', 'd']) AS date_parts FROM dates;
SELECT regexp_extract(date_string, p.pattern_string, ['y', 'm', 'd']) AS date_parts FROM dates d JOIN patterns p ON d.date_string LIKE '%-%' WHERE d.date_string IS NOT NULL;
WITH extracted_dates AS (SELECT regexp_extract(date_string, '(\d+)-(\d+)-(\d+)', ['y', 'm', 'd']) AS date_parts FROM dates) SELECT date_parts.y, date_parts.m FROM extracted_dates;
SELECT full_string, regexp_extract(full_string, '(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})', ['y', 'm', 'd']) AS valid_date FROM complex_dates;
INSERT INTO nested_tests VALUES ('First: 2023-04-15, Second: 2020-01-01'), ('No dates here'), ('2021-02-30 is not a valid date');

SELECT regexp_extract(test_string, '(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})', ['year', 'month', 'day']) AS valid_dates FROM nested_tests WHERE regexp_extract(test_string, '(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})', ['year', 'month', 'day']) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE people (name VARCHAR, birth_date VARCHAR);
SELECT name, regexp_extract(birth_date, '(\d+)-(\d+)-(\d+)', ['year', 'month', 'day']) AS birth_parts FROM people;
SELECT regexp_extract(birth_date, '(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})', ['year', 'month', 'day']) as extracted FROM (SELECT birth_date FROM people WHERE birth_date IS NOT NULL) sub;
